'''Edamame''' is an item that's used to make [[Unpodded Edamame]].

{{Item
| image = Edamame unpodded.png
| id = edamame_unpodded
| type = Food
| Subtype = Soy
| stackable = 64
| Description = Itadakimasu!
}}<span></span>
==Obtaining==
===Crafting===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
!Ingredients
!Recipe (''shapeless''''')'''
|-
|[[Soy Pods]] + Sugar
|[[File:Edamame crafting.png|336x336px]]
|}
==Usage==
*'''<code>Right click</code>''' to use the item.

==Trivia==
*It was added in DTN 1.18.0.
